title: Fukushima's Radioactive Ripples
subtitle: How nuclear meltdown triggered global energy crisis and expensive lunch

ripples.headline: Germany announces immediate nuclear phase-out, shutting 8 reactors within days
European natural gas demand surges 15% as nuclear alternatives sought
Russian Gazprom increases European pipeline capacity to meet demand spike
Ukrainian transit fees triple as Russian gas flows increase through Soviet-era pipelines
Eastern European steel production costs rise 8% due to higher energy prices
Polish pierogi factory reduces production shifts, laying off 12 weekend workers
Local Krakow burrito shop raises prices by €2 due to reduced pierogi competition

symphony_arc.opening: Nuclear cores melt in Japan, radiation spreads across Pacific currents
symphony_arc.development: European leaders panic, hastily shuttering reactors and scrambling for alternatives
symphony_arc.climax: Russian gas flows surge westward, reshaping continental energy dependence
symphony_arc.resolution: A Polish student pays extra for lunch, unaware of the radioactive butterfly effect
